name: 16S_primer_1492R_universal
description: Conserved 16S primer-binding site '1492R_universal' (length 22 bp, E. coli position ~1492). Consensus: TACGGYTACCTTGTTAYGACTT. 16S near-full-length reverse; Turner 1999. Universal across most Bacteria; minimal real-biology mismatch expected — mapper should NOT tolerate high mismatch here.
